verdict: Campaign is paused and bleeding momentum — leads collapsed to 2 this period despite strong purchase return.
diagnosis: Spend of $1,138 produced only 2 leads this period at $12 each, while paid clicks dropped to zero in the latest day.

signals.headline: Only 2 leads in 28 days
signals.detail: Paid effort generated just two leads this period. Volume is too low to forecast or optimize against.

signals.headline: Search campaign paused mid-period
signals.detail: The 'life alert' search campaign is paused. Impressions and clicks dropped to zero in the latest day.

signals.headline: 9 purchases worth $5,897 booked
signals.detail: Nine purchases closed at $737 average value. The buyer signal is real even with thin lead flow.

signals.headline: Only 1 phone call this period
signals.detail: Google Business Profile drove a single call click. For a call-focused campaign, that is the core problem.

signals.headline: 56 direction requests, zero bookings
signals.detail: Local interest exists but no business bookings recorded. The handoff from interest to action is broken.

benchmark.label: Benchmark
benchmark.subheader: Wellness cost per lead sits near $98
benchmark.body: Business-to-consumer wellness cost per lead averages $98 in 2026, with health and fitness near $63. Liferun's $12 cost per lead looks strong, but the 2-lead sample is too small to trust.

seasonal.label: Seasonal
seasonal.subheader: Late spring is a buying window for seniors
seasonal.body: Medical alert demand rises as families plan summer travel and check on aging parents. Pausing a search campaign now misses the seasonal intent spike around independence and fall prevention.

competitor.label: Competitor
competitor.subheader: Bay Alarm and MobileHelp pushing content
competitor.body: Bay Alarm Medical launched a weekly caregiver video series in April 2026. Category leaders are investing in family-caregiver content, not just product ads. Liferun's organic presence is effectively zero.

recommendations.title: Reactivate the paused search campaign
recommendations.detail: Consider turning the 'life alert' search campaign back on. Clicks and impressions hit zero in the latest day. Even modest spend keeps the pipeline warm.

recommendations.title: Fix the call and booking handoff
recommendations.detail: Test call tracking and a clearer phone prompt on the landing page. One call click in 28 days against 56 direction requests signals a conversion leak.

recommendations.title: Test caregiver-focused creative for 45-65+ audience
recommendations.detail: Worth exploring ad copy aimed at adult children, not just seniors. Competitors are winning with caregiver content. Current 'V4' creative may be too device-focused.
